label: Air / bioaerosol
route_summary: Environmental sample -> long-read metagenomic DNA -> air / bioaerosol
selection_help: Use this when the sample is most similar to the published air metagenomics study context.

label: Wetland / passive water
route_summary: Environmental sample -> long-read metagenomic DNA -> wetland / passive water
selection_help: Use this when the sample is most similar to the passive-water wetland surveillance system.

label: Soil
route_summary: Environmental sample -> long-read metagenomic DNA -> soil
selection_help: Use this when your sample is soil and you want the nearest published environmental backend rather than a false exact match.
unsupported_reason: No soil-specific long-read metagenomic workflow is currently published in this repository.

recommended_steps.rationale: Highest consensus accuracy for complex environmental samples

recommended_steps.recommendation: metaFlye or metaMDBG depending on read length

recommended_steps.rationale: Contextual AMR interpretation from published clinical metagenomics

pipeline_diagram.rationale: Starting point for all nanopore workflows.

pipeline_diagram.note: Convert raw signal to basecalled reads
pipeline_diagram.rationale: Dorado SUP gives the highest consensus accuracy. From CRE Plasmid workflow.
Proven environmental DNA filtering defaults (Q >= 8, min 200 bp). From Air Metagenomics.

pipeline_diagram.note: Classify reads against a reference database
pipeline_diagram.rationale: Established environmental community profiling. From Air Metagenomics.

pipeline_diagram.note: Metagenomic assembly depending on read length
pipeline_diagram.rationale: Best documented environmental metagenomic assembly. From Wetland Health DNA track.

pipeline_diagram.note: Detect antimicrobial resistance genes on assembled contigs
pipeline_diagram.rationale: Contextual AMR interpretation. From AMR Host Association.

label: Other environmental matrix
route_summary: Environmental sample -> long-read metagenomic DNA -> other environmental matrix
selection_help: Use this when the sample is environmental but not close to the published air or passive-water systems.
unsupported_reason: The public environmental DNA backends here are example-specific rather than a generic meta-pipeline for every matrix.

label: Wetland / passive water RNA virome
route_summary: Environmental sample -> RNA virome material -> wetland RNA virome
selection_help: Use this when the RNA virome material is closest to the wetland passive-water study context.

label: Other environmental RNA virome
route_summary: Environmental sample -> RNA virome material -> other environmental RNA virome
selection_help: Use this when your RNA virome case is not close to the published wetland passive-water example.
unsupported_reason: The repository does not currently contain a general-purpose environmental RNA virome backend beyond the wetland branch.

recommended_steps.rationale: Balanced accuracy for viral community material
Documented RNA virome assembly and polishing
Translated viral classification from published virome branch

pipeline_diagram.note: Basecalled reads from RNA virome material
pipeline_diagram.rationale: Starting point for RNA virome workflows.
Published RNA virome filtering defaults (Q >= 9, min 100 bp). From Wetland Health RNA track.
Documented RNA virome assembly. From Wetland Health RNA track.
Documented RNA virome polishing. From Wetland Health RNA track.
Translated viral classification. From Wetland Health RNA track.

label: Wetland 12S eDNA
route_summary: Environmental sample -> eDNA 12S amplicon -> wetland 12S eDNA
selection_help: Use this when the 12S material is closest to the wetland host-range and passive-water system.

label: Water eDNA example
route_summary: Environmental sample -> eDNA 12S amplicon -> water eDNA example
selection_help: Use this when the 12S route is closer to general water-eDNA metabarcoding than to the wetland host-range branch.

label: Other 12S eDNA context
route_summary: Environmental sample -> eDNA 12S amplicon -> other 12S context
selection_help: Use this when your 12S case is not close to either the wetland branch or the Zambia water-eDNA example.
unsupported_reason: The repository does not currently include a general-purpose 12S backend outside these two published study contexts.

recommended_steps.recommendation: VSEARCH with dereplication and chimera removal

pipeline_diagram.rationale: Starting point for eDNA amplicon workflows.
Published amplicon demultiplexing workflow. From Zambia eDNA.
Standard primer trimming after demultiplexing. From Zambia eDNA.
Published amplicon quality filtering. From Zambia eDNA.
Published 12S taxonomic assignment workflow. From Zambia eDNA.

label: Single-isolate assembly and AMR example
route_summary: Clinical / isolate -> single isolate long-read DNA -> AMR Nanopore example
selection_help: Use this when your isolate route is closest to the published single-isolate AMR nanopore workflow.

label: Other single-isolate context
route_summary: Clinical / isolate -> single isolate long-read DNA -> other single-isolate context
selection_help: Use this when your single-isolate workflow is not a close match to the published AMR Nanopore example.
unsupported_reason: The repository currently exposes one published single-isolate backend rather than a broader single-isolate workflow family.

pipeline_diagram.rationale: Starting point for isolate workflows.

pipeline_diagram.note: Convert raw signal to basecalled reads
pipeline_diagram.rationale: Published isolate basecalling workflow. From AMR Nanopore.
Published isolate filtering defaults (Q >= 9, min 200 bp). From AMR Nanopore.
Published isolate assembly. From AMR Nanopore.
Published isolate polishing. From AMR Nanopore.
Published isolate AMR detection. From AMR Nanopore.

label: Barcoded isolate example
route_summary: Clinical / isolate -> barcoded isolate long-read DNA -> CRE plasmid example
selection_help: Use this when your barcoded isolate route is closest to the published CRE plasmid clustering workflow.

label: Other barcoded-isolate context
route_summary: Clinical / isolate -> barcoded isolate long-read DNA -> other barcoded-isolate context
selection_help: Use this when your barcoded isolate route is not a close match to the published CRE example.
unsupported_reason: The repository currently exposes one published barcoded-isolate backend rather than a broader barcoded-isolate workflow family.

recommended_steps.rationale: Published plasmid reconstruction and AMR detection

pipeline_diagram.note: Raw nanopore signal files from barcoded isolates
pipeline_diagram.rationale: Starting point for barcoded isolate workflows.

pipeline_diagram.note: Convert raw signal to basecalled reads
pipeline_diagram.rationale: Published barcoded isolate basecalling. From CRE Plasmid workflow.
Published per-barcode separation. From CRE Plasmid workflow.
Published isolate assembly with Medaka polishing. From CRE Plasmid workflow.
Published plasmid reconstruction and AMR detection. From CRE Plasmid workflow.

label: Clinical metagenome host-association example
route_summary: Clinical / isolate -> clinical metagenome -> AMR host association
selection_help: This is the published clinical metagenome backend in the repository.

label: Listeria adaptive-sampling example
route_summary: Food safety -> Listeria enrichment / recovery -> adaptive-sampling example
selection_help: This is the published food-safety backend currently available in the repository.
